name: Zoho Corporation
description: Zoho Corporation is an Indian software products company known for its suite of web-based business tools and SaaS applications. Unlike most IT service companies, Zoho is a product company building its own software. Known for exceptional compensation and product-first culture.

overview.tagline: One Operating System for your Business

eligibility.backlogs: Maximum 1 active backlog (must be cleared within course duration)
eligibility.gap: Maximum 1 year gap (typically between 12th and graduation)
eligibility.note: Candidates who participated in Zoho interview process in last 6 months are ineligible. Zoho focuses heavily on programming fundamentals — not just aptitude.

recruitmentPattern.source: Based on Zoho Careers, FacePrep, GeeksforGeeks, and candidate experiences
recruitmentPattern.hiringProgram: Zoho Campus Drive / ZPAS (Zoho Placement Assistance System)

rounds.name: Written Round — Aptitude & Basic Programming
rounds.description: Quantitative aptitude, logical reasoning, and C/C++/Java/Python programming fundamentals + output-based questions.

rounds.name: Basic Programming Round
rounds.description: Write clean, efficient code for standard problems covering data structures, arrays, strings, and OOPs.

rounds.name: Advanced Programming / Machine Coding Round
rounds.description: Design and implement mini-applications or solve complex coding problems from scratch. Edge case handling required.

rounds.name: Technical Interview
rounds.description: In-depth discussion on projects, DSA, DBMS, OS, networking, and hands-on coding.

rounds.name: HR Interview
rounds.description: Background, motivation, alignment with Zoho's product-first culture.

rounds.name: GenAI & Prompt Engineering Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluation of GenAI fundamentals, prompt optimization, RAG pipelines, and enterprise security (prompt injection).

tips: Zoho places HIGHEST importance on programming fundamentals — master at least one language thoroughly
Machine coding round requires you to design working applications — practice mini-projects
Aptitude is still important — don't skip it
Be comfortable writing code on paper or without IDE completion
Know OOPs design patterns if possible
Zoho is a product company — show passion for building things, not just coding tasks
commonMistakes: Preparing only for service company patterns (Zoho is very different)
Not practicing machine coding / application design

tips: Be strong in at least C/C++ or Java
Practice writing code without IDE help
Be prepared to design a RAG pipeline or explain how to prevent prompt injection vulnerabilities.
Zoho culture values self-reliance and depth of knowledge
